001package com.github.tommyettinger.tantrum.regexodus;
002
003import org.apache.fory.Fory;
004import org.apache.fory.config.Config;
005import org.apache.fory.context.ReadContext;
006import org.apache.fory.context.WriteContext;
007import org.apache.fory.memory.BoundsChecking;
008import org.apache.fory.memory.MemoryBuffer;
009import org.apache.fory.memory.Platform;
010import org.apache.fory.serializer.Serializer;
011import regexodus.ds.CharBitSet;
012
013public class CharBitSetSerializer extends Serializer<CharBitSet> {
014    public CharBitSetSerializer(Fory fory) {
015        super(fory.getConfig(), CharBitSet.class, false);
016    }
017    public CharBitSetSerializer(Config fory) {
018        super(fory, CharBitSet.class, false);
019    }
020
021    @Override
022    public void write(final WriteContext fory, final CharBitSet data) {
023        final int[] bits = data.getRawBits();
024        fory.getBuffer().writePrimitiveArrayWithSize(bits, Platform.INT_ARRAY_OFFSET, bits.length << 2);
025    }
026
027    @Override
028    public CharBitSet read(ReadContext fory) {
029        final CharBitSet obs = new CharBitSet();
030        obs.setRawBits(readIntsAndSize(fory.getBuffer()));
031        return obs;
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * This method should be used to read data written by
036     * {@link MemoryBuffer#writePrimitiveArrayWithSize(Object, int, int)}.
037     */
038    private static int[] readIntsAndSize(MemoryBuffer buffer) {
039        final int numBytes = buffer.readVarUint32();
040        int readerIdx = buffer.readerIndex();
041        final int size = buffer.size();
042        // use subtract to avoid overflow
043        if (BoundsChecking.BOUNDS_CHECKING_ENABLED && readerIdx > size - numBytes) {
044            throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(
045                    String.format(
046                            "readerIdx(%d) + length(%d) exceeds size(%d): %s", readerIdx, numBytes, size, buffer));
047        }
048        final int[] ints = new int[numBytes >>> 2];
049        Platform.copyMemory(
050                buffer.getHeapMemory(), buffer.getUnsafeAddress() + readerIdx, ints, Platform.INT_ARRAY_OFFSET, numBytes);
051        buffer._increaseReaderIndexUnsafe(numBytes);
052        return ints;
053    }
054
055}
